name: Szechuan Spiced Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 green onions, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
PREPARE MARINADE: In a bowl, mix flour, salt, cornstarch, 1 tablespoon sherry, beaten egg, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, and baking soda. Stir in shrimp and refrigerate for at least one hour.
COMBINE SEASONINGS: Mix minced ginger root, garlic, green onions, and chili peppers; set aside.
COMBINE SAUCE INGREDIENTS: In a bowl, combine sugar, 2 tablespoons sherry, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, vinegar, ketchup, and water.
HEAT PEA
